center.name: 大西洋省 (哥伦比亚)
center.summary: 大西洋省 (哥伦比亚)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括鳞胸刀翅蜂鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: berlepschi, northern Colombia's Atlántico and Bolívar departments The scaly-breasted hummingbird inhabits a variety of semi-open to open landscapes including dry forest, edges and clearings of gallery and humid forest, mangroves, secondary forest, scrublands, and gardens
